---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What feature would you like?

Describe the feature.

## Why is it useful?

Explain who needs it and how it helps.

## Suggested behavior

Describe how you think it should work.

## Screenshots or examples

Add screenshots, sketches, or examples if helpful.

## Beginner friendly?

Could this be a good first issue?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not sure
